headline: Comey Surrenders 🏖️🐚 '86 47' THREAT to Trump 🍊👑‼️
text:
Ex-FBI boss James Comey 🙄🕵️‍♂️ just SURRENDERED 😩🔒 to fedz over his sus AF 2025 Insta post 🌀📱 – beach seashells 🐚🏖️ spelling '86 47' like a MOB HIT 💥🔫 on Trump the 47th PREZ 🍊👑! 'Eighty-six' = SLANG for 'WHACK HIM' 🪓🍆, prosecutors SLAYIN' 🔪 say it's a straight-up CALL TO VIOLENCE 😈💀 against DONNY! Comey playin' DUMB 🤪: 'Didn't know the deets, bro – took it DOWN cuz NO VIOLENCE VIBES ✌️!' But Trump DROPPIN' BOMBS 💣: 'Crooked Comey knows 86 = MOB KILL TERM 🕶️🔪 – son of a gun gettin' 86'd!' 😂🍊

Second time DOJ's CUFFIN' 👮‍♂️ Comey, Trump's longtime HATER 🚫❤️ – fired him back in 2016 Russia probe days 🐻🇷🇺! First indictment? LYIN' to Congress 🤥🏛️, got TOSSED cuz shady prosecutor appt 💸🚫. Now Virginia court drama 🎭⚖️: Judge Fitzpatrick reads charges 📜😤 – threats to KILL or HARM POTUS 🍑🔥, max 10 YRS SLAMMER ⛓️🍆 per count! Comey nods, SMILES at fam 😏👨‍👩‍👧‍👦, no plea, lawyer Patrick Fitzgerald (Valerie Plame revenge glow-up? 👀) cryin' SELECTIVE PROSECUTION BS 🤡 cuz anti-Trump rants!

Trump TEA-SPILLIN' ☕🔥 to reporters: 'Comey CREATED DANGER for pols 😱 – PROBABLY a threat!' Acting AG Todd Blanche 💪⚖️: 'Investigated a YEAR 📅, NO POLITICAL MOTIVES – threaten Trump? CRIME FULL STOP 🚫💥!' But haters whinin': GOP Sen Thom Tillis 🤨: 'Hope more than SAND PIC 🐚 – low bar AF!' Bush-era prosecutor Jimmy Gurulé 😤: 'EMBARRASSMENT to justice sys! 🤦‍♂️🇺🇸'

Comey vid statement 💬📹: 'Innocent AF, not scared, judiciary FTW 🏛️💪!' Post deleted after OUTCRY 😡📢, follow-up: 'Assumed political shells 🐚, didn't clock violence link – PEACE OUT ✌️!' Trump 2.0 pushin' DOJ to PROBE ENEMIES LIST 📝🔍 like Comey the ultimate CUCK 🐔 – from Epstein files vibes to Russia hoax OWNAGE 🍑💥! Legal experts SIMPIN' for weak case 🤤📉, but MAGA sayin' 'LOCK HIM UP' ⛓️🚀 – seashell sicario or innocent beach bro? JURY'S OUT 🎲⚖️, but Comey's SWEATIN' 😰💦 while Trump MOONS 'em all 🍑🌕‼️
